Terms & Conditions

These Terms & Conditions describe how Pulalend provides services and the responsibilities of users on the platform. Replace this text with your official legal terms.

By using Pulalend, you agree to comply with platform policies, provide accurate information, and maintain account security. Borrowers must honor repayment schedules, and lenders agree to the stated terms of each investment.

Pulalend may update these terms to improve services or comply with regulations. Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

If you have questions about these terms, please contact the Pulalend team for clarification.
